Program Overview
Accredited & aligned to the
NHA (CMAA) & AMCA national standards

Run the front office

As a medical administrative assistant, you'll keep the healthcare front office running — scheduling patients, managing records, verifying insurance and handling billing intake. Our online program teaches the administrative skills that matter on the job.

You'll learn medical terminology, the healthcare system, medical law and ethics, HIPAA and confidentiality, patient scheduling, insurance verification, billing intake, EHR navigation and claims processing.

After finishing, you'll be ready to take the NHA Certified Medical Administrative Assistant (CMAA) exam and/or the AMCA exam — nationally recognized credentials that open more job options and room to advance.
